title: Expectation And Fulfilment.
content:
Into life's ocean the youth with a thousand masts daringly launches;
    Mute, in a boat saved from wreck, enters the gray-beard the port.
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Expectation And Fulfilment."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
